subcodes.first_line: That wherewith thou didst commune with God, the Lord of all worlds, hath been presented before Us, and We have heard the lamentations of thy heart in separation from thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا ما ناجیت به الله رب العالمین و سمعنا حنین قلبک فی فراق مولاک
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @predictions and prophecies, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
